description: ⚠️ RESULTS ARE PAGINATED. Returns a list of source connections and destinations that are using a specific External Secrets Manager.

parameters.name: esmId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the External Secrets Manager instance.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by entity type. Accepted values are source, destination, or all.

id.description: The unique identifier of the source connection or destination.

name.description: The schema name of the source connection, or the name of the destination group.

enabled.description: Whether the source connection or destination is currently active and connected.

type.description: The type of entity using this External Secrets Manager. Possible values: SOURCE, DESTINATION.

secret_manager_id.description: The unique identifier of the External Secrets Manager instance.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the entity was created

items.description: An entity (connection or destination) that uses an External Secrets Manager

next_cursor.description: The value of the cursor parameter for the next page
